cellNexus 0.99.17
  • home
  • Query builder
  • gene expression explore

Atlas Version History

Source: ATLAS_VERSIONS.md

This file is the human-readable companion to the remote atlas_versions.parquet registry hosted in the cellNexus-metadata Nectar object store. Each entry here mirrors a row in that registry and is added alongside every call to cellNexus:::register_atlas_version(). The maintainer follows the atlas version in this README to append new registry.

Semantic versioning

The atlas_id column in get_metadata() is generated by the form <collection>_<census-year>/<X.Y.Z>, e.g. cellxgene_2024/0.1.0.

Version bump When to use
patch 0.1.x Bug fix within the same data (e.g. negative count values corrected)
minor 0.x.0 File IDs regenerated, new datasets added, or non-breaking schema additions
major x.0.0 Breaking format change (e.g. H5AD → TileDB) or a new Census year

cellxgene_2024/0.1.0

  • Census version: 01-07-2024
  • Change type: initial
  • Initial release of cellNexus atlas data linked to CellxGene Census 01-07-2024. CellxGene Census data releases (LTS): https://chanzuckerberg.github.io/cellxgene-census/cellxgene_census_docsite_data_release_info.html

Adding a new entry

When a new data version is released, run the following in R:

cellNexus:::register_atlas_version(
  atlas_id       = "cellxgene_YEAR/0.2.0",
  census_version = "DD-MM-YY",
  change_type    = "minor",
  description    = "Describe what changed.",
  credential_id     = Sys.getenv("NECTAR_CREDENTIAL_ID"),
  credential_secret = Sys.getenv("NECTAR_CREDENTIAL_SECRET")
)

This appends a new entry to the file stored on the Nectar object store and refreshes the corresponding data in the cloud.

On this page

Developed by Stefano Mangiola, Mengyuan Shen, Michael Milton, Jared Andrews, Juan Henao, Edward Yang, Silicon Valley Foundation CZF2019-002443, NIH NHGRI 5U24HG004059-18, Victoria Cancer Agency ECRF21036, NHMRC 1116955.
